summary: PDC v2 Step 1 Predefined Fields Testing - Backend: 9/9 tests PASSED. Frontend: Verified Fiche 3 carres comptage (16 rows x 4 columns), Fiche 4 epargne (4 types), Fiche 4 production (3 years). Backend accepts all new fields: carres_comptage, sol_elements, new maladies structure with maladie/severite/obs_maladie/parametre/valeur/obs_parametre.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: defaultMateriels (lines 470-487) correctly defines 16 predefined equipment types
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: carres_comptage (line 651) generates 16 rows with 4 columns when array is empty
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: defaultMaladies (lines 753-760) defines 6 predefined maladies with new structure (maladie/severite/obs_maladie/parametre/valeur/obs_parametre)
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: defaultSolElements (lines 793-797) defines 3 predefined sol elements
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: defaultEpargne (lines 903-908) defines 4 predefined epargne types
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: defaultProd (lines 942-946) defines 3 predefined production years (N-1, N-2, N-3)
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: defaultDepenses (lines 980-988) defines 7 predefined depenses types
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: Ombrage options (line 641) are Faible/Moyen/Dense (NOT Inexistant)
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: Canopee options (line 643) are Normal/Dense/Peu degrade/Degrade
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: Position options (lines 784-788) include Plateau
Backend pdc_v2.py: Step1Data model accepts any dict for fiche1-4, allowing new fields
seed_data_creation: Used existing PDC 'Test Planteur Activation' (69dbcbaa40f8055c60a8ee5a) in brouillon state
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDC v2 Step 1 predefined fields fully tested. Backend accepts all new fields (carres_comptage, sol_elements, new maladies structure). Frontend shows predefined rows when arrays are EMPTY. Use PDC in brouillon state to see defaults. PDC 'Test Planteur Activation' (69dbcbaa40f8055c60a8ee5a) was used for testing.
